name: Chinese Beef and Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly slice beef on the diagonal (for easy slicing, place meat in the freezer until slightly frozen); place in a snug-fitting bowl.
2. Combine soy sauce, sherry, garlic, and black pepper; pour over meat, tossing to coat completely. Cover and refrigerate 8 to 10 hours.
3. In a large skillet or wok, heat oil. Add green pepper and onion, sauté for 2 minutes.
4. Dissolve bouillon cube in boiling water.
5. Add beef and marinate. Bring to boiling point.
6. Reduce heat and simmer, covered for 8 minutes.
7. Blend cornstarch with cold water. Stir into the mixture in the skillet.
8. Cook and stir until thickened.
9. Cut tomatoes into wedges; add to skillet; stir gently.
10. Cover and simmer, just until tomatoes are hot, about 3 minutes.
11. Serve hot over rice with scallions, if desired. Serves 6 to 8.
